name: notket-documents
description: Single-user personal documents app: text notes, images and files with S3 + Neon Postgres.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/db/migrate.js && node --check src/middlewares/app-access.middleware.js && node --check src/middlewares/rate-limit.middleware.js && node --check src/middlewares/request-logging.middleware.js && node --check src/routes/web.routes.js && node --check src/routes/app.routes.js && node --check src/routes/document-message.routes.js && node --check src/routes/upload.routes.js && node --check src/routes/storage.routes.js && node --check src/routes/health.routes.js && node --check src/controllers/page.controller.js && node --check src/controllers/app.controller.js && node --check src/controllers/document-message.controller.js && node --check src/controllers/upload.controller.js && node --check src/controllers/storage.controller.js && node --check src/controllers/health.controller.js && node --check src/services/storage.service.js && node --check src/services/s3.service.js && node --check src/services/document-message.service.js && node --check src/services/upload.service.js && node --check src/repositories/document-message.repository.js && node --check src/repositories/document-upload.repository.js && node --check src/utils/file-magic.js && node --check src/utils/mime.js && node --check src/utils/filename.js && node --check src/utils/logger.js && node --check public/js/api.js && node --check public/js/home.js && node --check public/js/media-upload.js && node --check public/js/documents.js
scripts.test: node tests/env-config.test.js && node tests/app-access.middleware.test.js && node tests/app-access.api.test.js && node tests/file-validation.test.js && node tests/filename.test.js && node tests/logger.test.js && node tests/s3.service.test.js && node tests/storage.service.test.js && node tests/document-messages.service.test.js && node tests/health.api.test.js
